scripts.build: mkdir -p public local-engine && npm run build:engine && npm run build:bots && npm run build:client
scripts.build:client: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p public public/local-engine && ./node_modules/.bin/esbuild client.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --loader:.wasm=binary --external:./local-engine/engine.js --outfile=public/client.js && ./node_modules/.bin/esbuild browser-bots.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --loader:.wasm=binary --outfile=public/browser-bots.js && cp index.html styles.css service-worker.js public/ && cp local-engine/* public/local-engine/
scripts.build:engine: cargo build --manifest-path engine/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen engine/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/hex_tic_tac_engine.wasm --out-dir src/engine-wasm --out-name engine --target bundler && wasm-bindgen engine/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/hex_tic_tac_engine.wasm --out-dir local-engine --out-name engine --target web
scripts.build:bots: cargo build --manifest-path bots/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen bots/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/six_tac_bots.wasm --out-dir src/bot-wasm --out-name bots --target bundler && bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; snippet_dir=$(find src/bot-wasm/snippets -maxdepth 1 -type d -name "six-tac-bots-*" | head -n 1); test -n "${snippet_dir:-}"; mkdir -p "$snippet_dir/generated"; cp bots/generated/sealbot.js "$snippet_dir/generated/sealbot.js"'
scripts.export:kraken-onnx: uv run --with torch --with onnx --with onnxscript python bots/scripts/export_kraken_onnx.py
